title: papaver somniferum proles officinale
intro: Papaver somniferum proles officinale, also known as the opium poppy, is a sub-species of the opium poppy plant (Papaver somniferum), which is a flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant contains alkaloids such as morphine, codeine, and thebaine, which possess medicinal properties, primarily used in pain relief and cough suppression. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum proles officinale include its use in managing moderate to severe pain, as well as its potential in treating coughs and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and raw opium latex, which is often used in traditional medicine.
